scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*|bun/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.dev: sh -c 'PORT=${PORT:-8081} BASE_PATH=${BASE_PATH:-/} corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/merryexpresslogistics run dev'
scripts.build: corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:dev: sh -c 'PORT=${PORT:-8081} BASE_PATH=${BASE_PATH:-/} corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/merryexpresslogistics run build'
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run typecheck:libs && corepack pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
